title: Song of Surrender
writer: Ruth McKenney, Richard Bransten, Richard Maibaum
actors: Wanda Hendrix, Claude Rains, Macdonald Carey
plot: In 1906 in Connecticut, Elisha Hunt, the 55-year-old curator of a small government museum, marries Abigail, the 19-year-old daughter of a local farmer. In addition to the differences in their ages in this May-to-December union, El...
